sentences.target: Il reste vingt minutes avant le film.
sentences.reading: /il ʁɛst vɛ̃ minyt avɑ̃ lə film/

translations.fr: Il reste vingt minutes avant le film.
translations.ipa: /il ʁɛst vɛ̃ minyt avɑ̃ lə film/
translations.en: There are twenty minutes left before the movie.
translations.es: Faltan veinte minutos para que empiece la película.
translations.de: Bis der Film beginnt, sind es noch zwanzig Minuten.
translations.it: Il film inizia tra venti minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 电影开始前还有二十分钟。
translations.yue: 電影開始前仲有二十分鐘。
translations.ru: До начала фильма осталось двадцать минут.
translations.pt: O filme começa em vinte minutos.
translations.vi: Còn hai mươi phút nữa là phim bắt đầu.
translations.ar: تبقى عشرون دقيقة حتى يبدأ الفيلم.
translations.nl: Nog twintig minuten tot de film begint.
translations.uk: До початку фільму лишилося двадцять хвилин.
translations.hu: A film kezdéséig még húsz perc van.
translations.hi: फिल्म शुरू होने में बीस मिनट बचे हैं.
translations.pl: Do rozpoczęcia filmu zostało dwadzieścia minut.
translations.el: Απομένουν είκοσι λεπτά μέχρι να αρχίσει η ταινία.
translations.nb: Det er tjue minutter igjen til filmen begynner.
translations.id: Film akan mulai dalam dua puluh menit.
translations.sv: Det är tjugo minuter kvar tills filmen börjar.
translations.ro: Mai sunt douăzeci de minute până începe filmul.
translations.cs: Do začátku filmu zbývá dvacet minut.
translations.da: Der er tyve minutter tilbage, før filmen starter.
translations.fi: Elokuvan alkuun on jäljellä kaksikymmentä minuuttia.
translations.ja: 映画が始まるまであと20分ある。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun used here as an impersonal/expletive subject with a time-remaining construction.
Main verb in present 3rd person singular; expresses what is left/remaining.
Cardinal numeral functioning as quantifier/determiner for the noun 'minutes'.
Common plural noun; denotes a duration and serves as the logical subject (what remains).
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('le film').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'avant' in the prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: On a vingt personnes pour le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a vɛ̃ pɛʁsɔn puʁ lə dine/

translations.fr: On a vingt personnes pour le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a vɛ̃ pɛʁsɔn puʁ lə dine/
translations.en: We have twenty people for dinner.
translations.es: Tenemos veinte personas para la cena.
translations.ru: У нас двадцать человек на ужин.
translations.pt: Temos vinte pessoas para o jantar.
translations.he: יש לנו עשרים איש לארוחת ערב.
translations.vi: Bữa tối có hai mươi người.
translations.nl: We hebben twintig mensen voor het diner.
translations.uk: На вечерю у нас двадцять людей.
translations.hi: रात के खाने में बीस लोग हैं.
translations.nb: Vi har tjue personer til middag.
translations.id: Untuk makan malam ada dua puluh orang.
translations.sv: Vi har tjugo personer till middag.
translations.ro: Avem douăzeci de persoane la cină.
translations.da: Vi har tyve personer til middag.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic or colloquial 'we'); grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, present 3rd person singular agreeing with 'on'; transitive.
Cardinal numeral quantifying the noun 'personnes'.
Common plural noun; direct object of 'a'.
Preposition marking purpose, introducing 'le dîner'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'dîner'.
Common noun; complement (object) of the preposition 'pour' indicating the event's purpose.

translations.en: I have twenty euros to pay.
translations.de: Ich habe zwanzig Euro zum Bezahlen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有二十欧元可以付款。
translations.yue: 我有二十歐元可以俾錢。
translations.ru: У меня есть двадцать евро для оплати.
translations.tr: Ödemek için yanımda yirmi avro var.
translations.vi: Tôi có hai mươi euro để trả.
translations.nl: Ik heb twintig euro om te betalen.
translations.uk: У мене є двадцять євро для оплати.
translations.hi: मेरे पास भुगतान करने के लिए बीस यूरो हैं.
translations.el: Έχω είκοσι ευρώ για να πληρώσω.
translations.nb: Jeg har tjue euro til å betale med.
translations.id: Saya punya dua puluh euro untuk membayar.
translations.sv: Jag har tjugo euro att betala med.
translations.ro: Am douăzeci de euro pentru a plăti.
translations.da: Jeg har tyve euro til at betale.
translations.fi: Minulla on kaksikymmentä euroa maksua varten.
translations.ja: 支払い用に20ユーロあります。

tokens.explanation: Elided clitic subject pronoun before vowel-initial verb form; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present 1st person singular; takes a direct object.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'euros'.
Common plural noun; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival purpose clause.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'pour' to express purpose.

sentences.target: Elle fête ses vingt ans aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Elle fête ses vingt ans aujourd'hui.
translations.en: She's celebrating her twentieth birthday today.
translations.de: Sie feiert heute ihren zwanzigsten Geburtstag.
translations.ko: 오늘 그녀는 스무 살 생일을 축하하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她今天庆祝二十岁生日。
translations.yue: 佢今日慶祝二十歲生日。
translations.ru: Она сегодня отмечает свой двадцатый день рождения.
translations.he: היא חוגגת היום יום הולדת עשרים.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy mừng sinh nhật 20 tuổi.
translations.nl: Ze viert vandaag haar twintigste verjaardag.
translations.uk: Вона сьогодні святкує свій двадцятий день народження.
translations.hi: वह आज अपना बीसवाँ जन्मदिन मना रही है.
translations.el: Σήμερα γιορτάζει τα εικοστά γενέθλιά της.
translations.id: Hari ini dia merayakan ulang tahunnya yang ke-20.
translations.da: Hun fejrer sin tyvende fødselsdag i dag.
translations.ja: 彼女は今日20歳の誕生日を祝っています.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, present 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'ses vingt ans' as its object.
Possessive determiner agreeing in number with 'ans'; marks possession by the subject.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'ans' (age).
Common plural noun; head of the object noun phrase 'ses vingt ans' referring to age.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate the time of the event.
